prestazioni: Engine swap to a Toyota 1HD-FTE 4.2L turbocharged inline-six diesel (found in the Land Cruiser 80/100 series) with a Garrett GT3582R turbocharger, custom 3-inch stainless steel exhaust system by Fujitsubo, and a Pias Intercooler core (800x300x80mm) for reduced intake temperatures. Supporting mods include a Bosch 044 high-flow fuel pump, 300cc Denso injectors, and a Haltech Elite 2500 ECU for precise diesel tuning.

Full chassis reinforcement with a custom subframe brace kit by CUSCO, paired with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (specifically valved for the Dyna’s leaf spring front and rear suspension). Polyurethane bushings from SuperPro replace all OEM rubber mounts, and a Whiteline 25mm rear sway bar is added to reduce body roll during aggressive cornering.

Drivetrain upgrades include a Toyota R151F 5-speed manual transmission (from the HZJ79 Land Cruiser) with a Tilton twin-disc clutch, reinforced driveshafts by Driveshaft Shop, and a Torsen limited-slip differential from a Lexus IS-F (modified to fit the Dyna’s rear axle). Braking is handled by a full AP Racing BBK (330mm front, 300mm rear) with Ferodo DS2500 pads and braided stainless steel lines.
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using Rocket Bunny’s Dyna-specific overfenders (fiberglass construction, 4-inch flares front and rear) paired with a vented carbon fiber hood by Seibon. The front bumper is replaced with a custom steel tube bumper by Off Road Unlimited, featuring integrated Hella Rallye 4000 lights and a Warn Zeon 12-S winch.

Interior stripped and rebuilt with a full Sparco Pro 2000 seat kit (bolt-in brackets for Dyna cab), a MOMO Mod.78 steering wheel on a NRG quick-release hub, and a custom aluminum dashboard overlay by Auto Meter with a full suite of gauges (Boost, EGT, AFR, oil pressure). The bed is lined with Rhino Liner and fitted with a custom aluminum toolbox by Alu-Cab.

Aerodynamic enhancements include a custom carbon fiber rear wing by Voltex (Type 3, 1200mm width) mounted on aluminum pedestals, side skirts by Varis (Dyna-specific, bolt-on), and a front splitter by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-inch overhang). The truck is wrapped in 3M 1080 Gloss Black with red pinstriping by Vinyl Frog, and rides on Work Emotion CR Kiwami wheels (18x9 +12 front, 18x10.5 +20 rear) with Toyo Open Country R/T Trail tires (285/60R18).
